forbiddenWhen: the request is for an explicitly paid provider-routed sprint
the repository path cannot be resolved
the selected remote ref cannot be verified

ownedScope: local run context and evidence artifacts
steps: inspect source repository without modifying it
fetch and verify the selected remote branch
verify the selected commit belongs to that branch
run the managed installer from the isolated worktree
independently read back effective OpenCode settings
write run context, artifact registry, operator report, and final handoff
run focused validators before repository closeout

localHooks.reason: The workflow mutates WSL configuration and must remain an explicit operator action; CI and focused validators enforce repository contracts.

proof.static: workflow shape, parser, schemas, artifact contracts, and safety boundaries
proof.localApply: dependency installation and effective OpenCode configuration
proof.ceiling: No provider authentication, free-model availability, hosted response, push, merge, or deployment proof.
